nodes.title: CLIP Text Encode (Negative Prompt)
widgets_values: Negative: low quality, worst quality, deformed, distorted, disfigured, motion smear, motion artifacts

nodes.title: CLIP Text Encode (Positive Prompt)
widgets_values:
Camera: steady camera, fixed position, tripod.

Subject: "A vibrant street scene from Jamaica, featuring a city intersection with colorful buildings, traffic lights, and cars under a sunny sky."

Duration: The video should last approximately 8 seconds.

nodes.title: Negative Prompt Manager Text
widgets_values: looking at viewer, eye contact, staring at camera, facing viewer

nodes.title: Positve Prompt Manager Text
widgets_values:
[Cyberpunk-Dystopian Jamaican Street Scene at Night] --ar 4:5 --motion 30 --style anime --s 750 --chaos 20

A gritty, high-contrast manga-style night scene on a wet asphalt road in Jamaica. In the center, two figures stand near a corner island littered with trash and cardboard boxes; one figure is crouching while the other stands nearby. To the left, a makeshift vendor stall flickers with neon signs and glowing screen-like lights. Two white vehicles are parked further down the street, one with headlights on and another with bright taillights reflecting in puddles. Overhead, power lines hum faintly. The atmosphere is tense and mysterious, blending realistic textures with exaggerated cyberpunk shadows and vibrant, saturated colors.

"
Detailed photorealistic image of an ancient stone bell tower in a Mediterranean village. The tower is covered in vibrant green ivy, set against a backdrop of a deep blue sea. Terracotta tiled roofs line the foreground., static shot, golden hour sunlight, high detail, rustic texture, 8k
"
